channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Elon Musk’s bumbling X posts are inadvertently teaching everyone how government works
item.description: If what you don’t know can’t hurt you, Elon Musk may be in luck. With a series of candid posts on X, the White House’s resident broligarch has lately been divulging which aspects of civics and data science he appears to know little about.
item.dc:creator: Joe Berkowitz, Fast Company

item.title: Mozilla’s new message: We’re the only browser not backed by billionaires
item.description: As frustration with corporate power grows under the oligarch-friendly Trump administration, Mozilla Firefox stands out more than ever for at least one defining trait: It isn’t owned by a giant tech company.
item.dc:creator: Rob Pegoraro, Fast Company

item.title: Used Tesla prices depreciated more than any other automaker in 2024
item.description: The price of used Tesla’s Model 3 and Model Y vehicles depreciated more than any other cars in 2024, according to a Fast Company analysis of CarGurus data.
item.dc:creator: Andrew Thompson, Fast Company

item.title: Shure's tiny MoveMic 88+ gives creators a cheap and easy way to record crystal clear audio on a smartphone
item.description: Shure MoveMic 88+ is a small, lightweight wireless mic designed for professional recordings via your smartphone
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: What Happens to the "Air" Name on New iPads?
item.description: The 'Air' name has been a hallmark of Apple's products, but with recent changes, its meaning is becoming murky.
item.dc:creator: lance.ulanoff@futurenet.com (Lance Ulanoff), TechRadar

item.title: El CIO ante el desafío de gestionar los agentes de IA
item.description: En un escenario en el que los agentes de IA ya están preparados para hacerse cargo de gran parte del flujo de trabajo de las empresas, los líderes de TI tendrán que afrontar un reto cada vez más complejo: gestionarlos.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Employee screening data breach exposes 3.3 million records
item.description: Major employee screening company data breach affects 3.3 million people. Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson explains what happened and gives five ways to protect your data.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Georgia lawmakers push to ban automated speed cameras near schools
item.description: DECATUR, Ga. (AP) — Outside Beacon Hill Middle School in the Atlanta suburb of Decatur, like along hundreds of roadsides across Georgia, the unblinking eye of a camera tickets drivers who speed through a school zone.
item.dc:creator: JEFF AMY, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Deep tech disruption: How advanced technologies are transforming businesses
item.description: CEOs, CIOs and CFOs are finding that “deep tech” is actively driving business innovation and profitability. From AI models that boost sales to robots that slash production costs, advanced technologies are transforming both top-line growth and bottom-line efficiency.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: 5 questions about Trump’s crypto reserve plan
item.description: President Trump offered new details about his plan to create a strategic crypto reserve over the weekend, prompting the cryptocurrency market to rally after a few sluggish weeks.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Worried your Nvidia RTX 5080, 5090 or 5070 Ti isn't performing as well as it should? CPU-Z can now check your GPU for missing ROPs
item.description: A new update to CPU-Z Validator now checks for missing ROPs for reduced performance in Nvidia's RTX 50 series graphics cards.
item.dc:creator: alekshamcloughlin@outlook.com (Aleksha McLoughlin), TechRadar

item.title: New Google Pixel 9a leaks tease color options, and satellite connectivity to take on the iPhone 16e
item.description: We've got some more details about what to expect from the Pixel 9a in terms of its design and features.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: DeepSeek claims 545% cost-profit ratio, challenging AI industry economics
item.description: Chinese AI startup DeepSeek has claimed its V3 and R1 models achieve a theoretical daily cost-profit ratio of 545%, highlighting cost implications for enterprises adopting similar models from other cloud providers.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: How Block is accelerating engineering velocity through developer experience
item.description: The Block ecosystem of brands – including Square, Cash App, Spiral and TIDAL – is driven by more than 4,000 engineers and thousands of interconnected software systems. Today, Block is doubling down on engineering velocity, investing in major initiatives to help teams ship software even faster.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Teradata adds Enterprise Vector Store to augment RAG
item.description: Teradata is adding vector support to its platform in the form of a new Enterprise Vector Store, an in-database offering, to enable and augment use cases that require retrieval augmented generation (RAG), such as agentic AI.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Hulu ended its first live Oscars stream before the final awards. Viewers were not happy
item.description: Sunday night marked Hulu’s first time airing the Oscars live. But its Academy Awards debut ended on a chaotic and frustratingly premature note.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Melania Trump says it's 'heartbreaking' to watch teens grapple with the fallout from revenge porn
item.description: Melania Trump says it’s “heartbreaking” to see teens and especially girls grapple with the fallout after they’re targeted by malicious and sexually explicit online content.
item.dc:creator: Darlene Superville, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: UK data protection watchdog investigating how TikTok uses children's personal data
item.description: LONDON (AP) — The U.K.'s data protection watchdog said Monday that it's investigating how TikTok uses the personal information of teenagers to deliver content recommendations to them when they use the social media platform.
item.dc:creator: SYLVIA HUI, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: The 2025 Terminator? Lab-grown muscle brings biohybrid robot hand to life
item.description: Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson talks about how lab-grown muscles power a biohybrid hand for scalable prosthetics and research.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: How eBPF is changing container networking
item.description: “No man is an island,” wrote John Donne. But containers certainly are. They are created as islands in and of themselves, packaged with all they need to operate independently—code, dependencies, and runtime. This autonomy is great for security but not so great for networking.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Who needs Google technology? Probably not you
item.description: Clearly Google is doing something right. Although Google Cloud’s revenue still lags AWS and Microsoft Azure, it’s growing much faster (albeit on a smaller base). But that’s not the real story of its growth. The story is that it’s growing at all.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: White House to host first Crypto summit
item.description: The White House is set to welcome professionals in the cryptocurrency industry on March 7 for a first-of-its-kind summit.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, The Hill

item.title: Chip Ganassi Racing partners with OpenAI in first motorsports venture for AI company
item.description: ST. PETERSBURG, Fla. (AP) — Chip Ganassi Racing on Friday said it has partnered on a strategic research collaboration with OpenAI — a deal that makes the two-time reigning IndyCar championship winning team the first to bring in a partner from the artificial intelligence field.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Rust 1.85 arrives with long-awaited async closures
item.description: Rust 1.85, the latest version of the burgeoning language positioned for speed, safety, and ease of use, has arrived, with new capabilities including async closures. The release also constitutes a stabilization of the Rust 2024 edition of the language.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Microsoft shutting down Skype in May
item.description: Microsoft is closing down Skype, the video-calling service it bought for $8.5 billion in 2011, which had helped spark a transformation in how people communicate online.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Google co-founder: Be in the office every weekday, work 60 hours a week
item.description: Google co-founder Sergey Brin sent an internal message Wednesday to the group working on the company’s AI model Gemini. In the message, Brin wrote that Google can become a leader in AI development — provided that employees work more.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Santa Cruz-based Joby Aviation expects first air taxi passengers in late 2025, early 2026
item.description: The company also reported it received more than $1 billion of additional funding and commitments in the fourth quarter.
item.dc:creator: James Herrera, The Mercury News

item.title: Apple, Samsung strike deal for purchase of San Jose office building
item.description: Samsung has bought from Apple a big office building in San Jose, a deal that would enable the tech and consumer electronics titan to widen its Silicon Valley footprint.
item.dc:creator: George Avalos, The Mercury News

item.title: AI & Data Exchange 2025: TD Synnex Public Sector’s Trey Bostick on ensuring secure data flow to support AI expansion
item.description: As agencies expand use cases, scaling AI and reaping benefits will hinge on evolving federal data infrastructure, TD Synnex Public Sector expert explains.
item.dc:creator: Anastasia Obis, Federal News Network

item.title: DeepSeek offers steep discounts, escalating AI price war
item.description: Chinese AI firm DeepSeek has unveiled a significant price reduction for developers using its AI models, a move that could intensify competition among both domestic and global rivals.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Vietnam plans energy shift toward building more solar, less reliance on gas and coal
item.description: HANOI, Vietnam (AP) — Vietnam is revising its energy plans to focus more on large solar farms and less on reliance on coal and natural gas. The fast-growing economy now aims to get 16% of its energy from the sun — more than triple its earlier target of just 5%.
item.dc:creator: ANIRUDDHA GHOSAL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Nvidia sales surge in the fourth quarter on demand for AI chips
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Nvidia on Wednesday reported a surge in fourth-quarter profit and sales as demand for its specialized Blackwell chips, which power artificial intelligence systems, continued to grow, sending the company's stock higher after hours. For the three months that ended Jan.
item.dc:creator: SARAH PARVINI, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Man who said he was upset with Musk and Trump charged with threatening to burn down xAI facility
item.description: ASHLAND CITY, Tenn. (AP) — A Tennessee man has been charged with an act of terrorism after he threatened to burn down an xAI facility because he was upset with its founder, Elon Musk, and President Donald Trump, authorities said.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Packaged offerings promise to make AI infrastructure deployment easier
item.description: Most enterprises deploying AI technology have been turning to hyperscalers such as Amazon, Google and Microsoft to provide all the necessary infrastructure. According to IDC data released this month, cloud and shared environments account for most AI server spending — 72% in the first half of 2024.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: Meet the AI real estate agent making millions
item.description: Stay up to date on the latest AI technology advancements and learn about the challenges and opportunities AI presents now and for the future.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Autonomous robotaxi successfully completes 75 mph highway testing
item.description: Motional is developing autonomous vehicles capable of handling a wide range of real-world scenarios. Its high-speed robotaxi testing reached speeds of 75 mph.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
